title: ws.rs: GROUP_SEND handler (fan-out to all group members)
description:
What: Add GROUP_SEND relay WebSocket handler in relay/src/ws.rs — the core fan-out logic.

Algorithm:
1. Parse GroupSendParams { group_id, payload }
2. Check subscription gate (if require_subscription)
3. store.is_group_member(group_id, pub_id.0).await → verify sender is member; if not: NOT_A_MEMBER error
4. store.list_group_members(group_id).await → Vec<String> of member pub_ids
5. message_id = Uuid::new_v4().to_string()
6. Build GroupDeliverParams notification: from = pub_id.0 (relay-set), group_id, payload (opaque)
7. Serialize notification to JSON string
8. Call state.broadcast_to_group(members, Some(&pub_id.0), notify_json).await
9. Return GroupSendResult { message_id }

Defensive rules:
- Subscription check FIRST before store.is_group_member
- from ALWAYS set from authenticated pub_id, never from params (CLAUDE.md invariant #4)
- Payload is opaque Vec<u8>; relay MUST NOT deserialize it (CLAUDE.md invariant #3 and #7)
- Empty group (no members other than sender): still return success, but deliver to 0 peers

Team: standard R+I+T
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-relay passes; non-member GROUP_SEND returns NOT_A_MEMBER; sender does not receive own GROUP_DELIVER; offline member gets message queued
